ideal_must_detect.matched_text: may be expected to materially affect the price of the Company’s securities
unauthorised access to an external virtual data room
the intrusion vector was a compromised advisor account
no selective briefings to analysts or investors will be made
reduce the risk of selective disclosure during blackout windows
proposed acquisition of HarbourNova Robotics Pte. Ltd
internal unaudited H1 FY2026 trading update
board papers on the proposed acquisition

Telok Ayer Marine & Engineering Limited (SGX-ST Mainboard-listed) detected on 18 July 2026 an unauthorised access to an external virtual data room (operated by BlueKite Data Rooms Pte. Ltd.) used for the ongoing proposed acquisition of HarbourNova Robotics Pte. Ltd.

Preliminary review confirms access to a draft share purchase agreement, board papers on the proposed acquisition, an internal unaudited H1 FY2026 trading update, and preliminary documentation for a planned dual-tranche SGD note issuance under our MTN Programme.

The H1 trading update and financing timetable are not generally available information and may be expected to materially affect the price of the Company’s securities within the meaning of Rule 703; the incident occurred within the Company’s blackout window (15 July–30 July) ahead of the H1 results release.

We have commenced assessment under the PDPA and will notify the PDPC and affected individuals as soon as practicable and no later than three calendar days if the breach is notifiable; no payment card data or health data were involved.

We have commenced assessment under the PDPA and will notify the PDPC and affected individuals as soon as practicable and no later than three calendar days if the breach is notifiable; no payment card data or health data were involved.
